use.flag: Use rocWMMA to enhance flash attention performance
Build an OpenCL backend, so far only works on Adreno and Intel GPUs
Build an Intel SYCL backend (Arc GPU, Intel CPU via oneAPI). Requires a -fsycl-capable compiler (Intel icpx or clang++ with SYCL patches) installed separately.
Build the embedded llama-server web UI. Fetches prebuilt assets from the upstream Hugging Face bucket at configure time; disable for a server binary with only the HTTP API.
